description: Naive-forecaster baselines on the cohort's resolved-market pool · companion to vpi_nav.json

random_binary.description: forecast = 0.5 always · the lower bound for a binary forecaster

favorite_naive.description: forecast = 1 if market_price > 0.5 else 0 · "follow the favorite" strategy

market_vwap.description: forecast = market_price · the prediction market itself · the strongest naive baseline

perfect_prophet.description: forecast = actual · the math ceiling · achievable only with hindsight
